member.name: T:MVCApplication.Controllers.AccountController
member.summary: Controller responsible for handling user account-related actions such as registration, login, and logout.

member.name: M:MVCApplication.Controllers.AccountController.#ctor(MVCApplication.Data.AppDb,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{MVCApplication.Controllers.AccountController},Microsoft.Extensions.Options.IOptions{MVCApplication.Models.Seeding.AdminSettings})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the AccountController class with the provided database context,

member.name: M:MVCApplication.Controllers.AccountController.Register(System.String)
member.summary: Handles user registration by displaying the registration form. If the user is already authenticated, they are redirected to the home page.
member.param: Optional return URL after successful registration

member.name: M:MVCApplication.Controllers.AccountController.Register(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Handles user by validating input and saving the new user to the database. If any required fields are missing, an error message is displayed.
member.param: Optional admin password to assign admin role
member.returns: Redirects on success or returns the view with errors

member.name: M:MVCApplication.Controllers.AccountController.Login(System.String)
member.summary: Displays the login page or redirects if the user is already authenticated.

member.name: M:MVCApplication.Controllers.AccountController.Login(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Handles user login by validating credentials and setting session data.
member.returns: Redirects on success or returns the view with errors

member.name: M:MVCApplication.Controllers.AccountController.Logout
member.summary: Logs the user out by clearing the session and redirects to the login page.

member.name: T:MVCApplication.Controllers.AdminController
member.summary: Controller responsible for handling administrative actions such as managing users, events, and feedback.

member.name: M:MVCApplication.Controllers.AdminController.#ctor(MVCApplication.Data.AppDb,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{MVCApplication.Controllers.AdminController})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the AdminController class with the provided database context.

member.name: M:MVCApplication.Controllers.AdminController.Index
member.summary: Displays the main admin dashboard. Requires admin access.
member.returns: Admin dashboard view

member.name: M:MVCApplication.Controllers.AdminController.Announcements
member.summary: Displays all announcements for admin management. Requires admin access.
member.returns: Announcements view with data

member.name: M:MVCApplication.Controllers.AdminController.Announcements(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Int32},System.Collections.Generic.List{MVCApplication.Models.Announcement},MVCApplication.Models.Announcement,System.Nullable{MVCApplication.Helpers.ActionEnums.AdminUserAction})
member.summary: Handles announcement management actions such as create, update, and delete.
member.param: List of announcement IDs for delete operations
List of announcements for update operations
Action to perform: create, update, or delete
member.returns: Redirects on success or returns the view with errors

member.name: M:MVCApplication.Controllers.AdminController.Users
member.summary: Displays all users and populates the model with user data from the database. Requires admin access.
member.returns: Users view with data

member.name: M:MVCApplication.Controllers.AdminController.Users(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Int32},System.Collections.Generic.List{MVCApplication.Models.User},MVCApplication.Models.User,System.Nullable{MVCApplication.Helpers.ActionEnums.AdminUserAction})
member.summary: Handles user management actions such as create, update, and delete.
member.param: List of user IDs for delete operations
List of users for update operations
member.returns: Redirects on success or returns the view with errors

member.name: M:MVCApplication.Controllers.AdminController.Events
member.summary: Displays all events and populates the model with event data from the database. Requires admin access.
member.returns: Events view with data

member.name: M:MVCApplication.Controllers.AdminController.Events(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Int32},System.Collections.Generic.List{MVCApplication.Models.Event},MVCApplication.Models.Event,System.Nullable{MVCApplication.Helpers.ActionEnums.AdminUserAction})
member.summary: Handles event management actions such as create, update, and delete.
member.param: List of event IDs for delete operations
List of events for update operations
member.returns: Redirects on success or returns the view with errors

member.name: M:MVCApplication.Controllers.AdminController.Feedback
member.summary: Displays all feedback entries and populates the model with feedback data from the database. Requires admin access.
member.returns: Feedback view with data

member.name: M:MVCApplication.Controllers.AdminController.Feedback(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Int32},System.Collections.Generic.List{MVCApplication.Models.Feedback},MVCApplication.Models.Feedback,System.Nullable{MVCApplication.Helpers.ActionEnums.AdminUserAction})
member.summary: Handles feedback management actions such as create, update, and delete.
member.param: List of feedback IDs for delete operations
List of feedback entries for update operations
Single feedback entry for create operations
member.returns: Redirects on success or returns the view with errors

member.name: M:MVCApplication.Controllers.AdminController.Bookings
member.summary: Displays all booking entries and populates the model with booking data from the database. Requires admin access.
member.returns: Booking view with data

member.name: M:MVCApplication.Controllers.AdminController.Bookings(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Int32},System.Collections.Generic.List{MVCApplication.Models.Booking},MVCApplication.Models.Booking,System.Nullable{MVCApplication.Helpers.ActionEnums.AdminUserAction})
member.summary: Handles booking management actions such as create, update, and delete.
member.param: List of booking IDs for delete operations
List of booking entries for update operations
Single booking entry for create operations
member.returns: Redirects on success or returns the view with errors

member.name: M:MVCApplication.Controllers.AdminController.Logs
member.summary: Displays the application logs for administrators.
member.returns: Application logs view

member.name: T:MVCApplication.Controllers.BaseAppController`1
member.summary: Base controller that provides shared database access and common functionality for all other controllers in the application.

member.name: F:MVCApplication.Controllers.BaseAppController`1._db
member.summary: Database context for accessing application data, shared across all controllers that inherit from BaseAppController.

member.name: M:MVCApplication.Controllers.BaseAppController`1.#ctor(MVCApplication.Data.AppDb,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{`0})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the BaseAppController class with the provided database context, allowing derived controllers to access the database through the _db field.

member.name: P:MVCApplication.Controllers.BaseAppController`1.IsAuth
member.summary: Gets authentication status of session and sets true if not null

member.name: P:MVCApplication.Controllers.BaseAppController`1.IsAdmin
member.summary: Gets role of session and sets true if admin

member.name: M:MVCApplication.Controllers.BaseAppController`1.Build(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Method to make instance of model and set essential data to properties
member.param: Table that is related to operations
member.returns: AndInTheDarknessBindThem initialised model with data in params

member.summary:
Method that handles Authorisation (auth/admin) GET model pop and validation POST save and redirection
We Trade One Villain for Another
member.param: Key of Dict containing value pair of UX parameters
Optional delegate that populates the view model with data from db before rendering the view
Optional delegate that validates model and returns false to trigger 404
Optional delegate that does POST operations
Optional delegate that stores where to be redirected to after a POST
member.returns: An IActionResult representing either a view, redirect, or error response

member.name: M:MVCApplication.Controllers.BaseAppController`1.Guard(System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Method to authorise if session data matches set requirements for user
member.param: IfTrue Checks session for authenticated admin
IfTrue Checks session for authenticated user
member.returns: IActionResult redirect to login if session data doesnt match required params set, otherwise null

member.name: T:MVCApplication.Controllers.DashboardController
member.summary: This controller is responsible for handling user dashboard-related actions, such as displaying the main dashboard, user bookings, and profile information.

member.name: M:MVCApplication.Controllers.DashboardController.#ctor(MVCApplication.Data.AppDb,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{MVCApplication.Controllers.DashboardController})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the DashboardController class with the provided database context.

member.name: M:MVCApplication.Controllers.DashboardController.Index
member.summary: Displays the main dashboard view for authenticated users.
member.returns: Dashboard view

member.name: M:MVCApplication.Controllers.DashboardController.MyBookings
member.summary: Handles HTTP GET requests for the My Bookings dashboard view, retrieving and displaying bookings associated with the currently authenticated user.
member.remarks: This action requires the user to be authenticated. If the user is not authenticated or has no associated bookings, the view will display an empty bookings list.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous operation. The task result contains an that renders the My Bookings view with the user's bookings.

member.name: M:MVCApplication.Controllers.DashboardController.Profile
member.summary: Displays the current logged-in user's profile information.
member.returns: Profile view with current user data

member.name: M:MVCApplication.Controllers.DashboardController.Profile(MVCApplication.Models.User)
member.summary: Updates the current logged-in user's profile information.
member.param: Updated user details from the profile form
member.returns: Redirects back to the profile page

member.name: T:MVCApplication.Controllers.EventsController
member.summary: Controller responsible for handling event-related actions such as viewing, creating, and displaying event details.

member.name: M:MVCApplication.Controllers.EventsController.#ctor(MVCApplication.Data.AppDb,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{MVCApplication.Controllers.EventsController})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the EventsController class with the provided database context.

member.name: M:MVCApplication.Controllers.EventsController.Index
member.summary: Displays all events and populates the model with event data from the database.
member.returns: Events view with data

member.name: M:MVCApplication.Controllers.EventsController.Create
member.summary: Displays the event creation page for authenticated users.
member.returns: Create event view

member.name: M:MVCApplication.Controllers.EventsController.Create(MVCApplication.Models.Event,System.Nullable{System.Int32})
member.summary: Handles event creation by validating input and saving the new event to the database.
member.param: Event object containing user input data
member.returns: Redirects on success or returns the view with errors

member.name: M:MVCApplication.Controllers.EventsController.Details
member.summary: Displays the event details page.
member.returns: Event details view

member.name: M:MVCApplication.Controllers.EventsController.Details(System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieves and displays specific event details based on the provided ID.
member.returns: Event details view with data or error if not found

member.name: M:MVCApplication.Controllers.EventsController.Register(System.Int32)
member.summary: Registers the current logged-in user for an event.
member.returns: Redirects back to the event details page

member.name: M:MVCApplication.Controllers.EventsController.RegisterConfirmation(System.Int32)
member.summary: Displays confirmation after registering for an event.
member.returns: Registration confirmation view

member.name: T:MVCApplication.Controllers.HomeController
member.summary: Controller responsible for handling general site pages such as the home page, announcements, feedback, FAQ, and error pages.

member.name: M:MVCApplication.Controllers.HomeController.#ctor(MVCApplication.Data.AppDb,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{MVCApplication.Controllers.HomeController})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the HomeController class with the provided database context.

member.name: M:MVCApplication.Controllers.HomeController.Error
member.summary: Displays the error page with the current request identifier.
member.returns: Error view with request details

member.name: M:MVCApplication.Controllers.HomeController.Index
member.summary: Displays the home page. Populates announcements and events so they render on the index view.
member.returns: Home view

member.name: M:MVCApplication.Controllers.HomeController.Announcements
member.summary: Displays the announcements page with announcement data from the database.
member.returns: Announcements view with data

member.name: M:MVCApplication.Controllers.HomeController.Feedback
member.summary: Displays the feedback form page.
member.returns: Feedback form view

member.name: M:MVCApplication.Controllers.HomeController.Feedback(MVCApplication.Models.Feedback)
member.summary: Handles feedback form submission by validating input and saving the feedback to the database.
member.param: Feedback object containing user input data
member.returns: Redirects on success or returns the view with errors

member.name: M:MVCApplication.Controllers.HomeController.FAQ
member.summary: Displays the FAQ page.
member.returns: FAQ view

member.name: M:MVCApplication.Controllers.HomeController.Confirmation
member.summary: Displays the confirmation page.
member.returns: Confirmation view

member.name: T:MVCApplication.Controllers.ServicesController
member.summary: Controller responsible for handling service booking actions such as viewing bookings, booking services, and viewing booking details.

member.name: M:MVCApplication.Controllers.ServicesController.#ctor(MVCApplication.Data.AppDb,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{MVCApplication.Controllers.ServicesController})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the ServicesController class with the provided database context.

member.name: M:MVCApplication.Controllers.ServicesController.Index(System.Nullable{System.Int32})
member.summary: Displays all bookings or a specific booking if an ID is provided.
member.returns: Services view with booking data

member.name: M:MVCApplication.Controllers.ServicesController.Index(System.Int32,System.Nullable{MVCApplication.Helpers.ActionEnums.ServiceAction})
member.summary: Handles user actions from the services page such as navigating to details or booking pages.
member.returns: Redirects based on action or returns the view

member.name: M:MVCApplication.Controllers.ServicesController.Details(System.Int32)
member.summary: Displays details for a specific booking.
member.returns: Booking details view or error if not found

member.name: M:MVCApplication.Controllers.ServicesController.Book
member.summary: Displays the booking page for authenticated users.
member.returns: Booking form view

member.name: M:MVCApplication.Controllers.ServicesController.Book(MVCApplication.Models.Booking)
member.summary: Handles booking submission by validating input and saving the booking to the database.
member.param: Booking object containing user input data
member.returns: Redirects on success or returns the view with errors

member.name: M:MVCApplication.Controllers.ServicesController.RatesEnquiries
member.summary: Displays the rates enquiries page with pricing information for services.
member.returns: Rates enquiries view

member.name: M:MVCApplication.Data.AppDb.SaveEventBooking(System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Saves an event registration as a booking for the current user.
member.returns: True if saved successfully, otherwise false.

member.name: M:MVCApplication.Data.AppDb.GetAnnouncements
member.summary: Gets all announcements from the database.
member.returns: A list of announcements, or null if there was a database error.

member.name: M:MVCApplication.Data.AppDb.SaveAnnouncement(MVCApplication.Models.Announcement)
member.summary: Saves a new announcement to the database.
member.returns: True if the announcement was saved successfully, otherwise false.

member.name: M:MVCApplication.Data.AppDb.UpdateAnnouncements(System.Collections.Generic.List{MVCApplication.Models.Announcement})
member.summary: Updates existing announcements in the database.
member.returns: The number of rows affected.

member.name: M:MVCApplication.Data.AppDb.DeleteAnnouncements(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Int32})
member.summary: Deletes selected announcements from the database.
member.returns: True if at least one announcement was deleted, otherwise false.

member.name: M:MVCApplication.Data.AppDb.SaveLog(MVCApplication.Models.Log)
member.summary: Saves a log entry to the database.
member.returns: True if the log was saved successfully, otherwise false.

member.name: M:MVCApplication.Data.AppDb.GetLogs
member.summary: Gets all application logs from the database.
member.returns: A list of logs, or null if there was a database error.

members.member: Singleton class to represent footer configuration loaded from XML configuration
Class to represent a menu item, which contains display text, a URL, and an order for sorting

member.name: T:MVCApplication.XMLServices.IXMLConfigService
member.summary: Interface for XML configuration service that provides methods to retrieve features and menus from XML configuration files.

member.name: M:MVCApplication.XMLServices.XMLConfigService.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.IHostEnvironment)
member.summary: Construct the service and load all XML configuration from the Config folder. The IHostEnvironment is used to resolve the application's ContentRootPath so files are read from the deployed content root (e.g., MVCApplication/Config).

member.name: M:MVCApplication.XMLServices.XMLConfigService.SafeSettings
member.summary: Create secure XmlReaderSettings to avoid XML External Entity (XXE) attacks. We prohibit DTD processing and disable XmlResolver so external resources cannot be resolved.

member.name: M:MVCApplication.XMLServices.XMLConfigService.LoadAll
member.summary: Load all configuration files into memory. Each loader returns a list of POCOs which are cached on the service instance. This method is safe to call on startup or when you implement a reload/watch mechanism.

member.name: M:MVCApplication.XMLServices.XMLConfigService.LoadFeatures
member.summary: Load features from features.xml. The parser is case-insensitive to element and attribute names to accommodate lowercase XML. Uses XmlReader with SafeSettings for secure parsing. On parse errors, the method returns the previous cached value to avoid replacing a working configuration with an empty list.

member.name: M:MVCApplication.XMLServices.XMLConfigService.LoadFooters
member.summary:
Load footer layout from footer.xml. The expected structure is:
The method returns a list to support multiple footer sets in the future, but the current XML typically contains a single footer section.

member.name: M:MVCApplication.XMLServices.XMLConfigService.GetFeatures
member.summary: Return the cached list of features. Caller should treat the returned list as readonly.

member.name: M:MVCApplication.XMLServices.XMLConfigService.GetFeature(System.String)
member.summary: Find a feature by id (case-insensitive). Returns null if not found.

member.name: M:MVCApplication.XMLServices.XMLConfigService.GetMenus
member.summary: Return all parsed menus.

member.name: M:MVCApplication.XMLServices.XMLConfigService.GetMenu(System.String)
member.summary: Find a menu by id (case-insensitive). Returns null if not found.

member.name: M:MVCApplication.XMLServices.XMLConfigService.GetFooters
member.summary: Return the parsed footer sections. Currently this typically contains a single Footer.

member.name: M:MVCApplication.XMLServices.XMLConfigService.GetFooter(System.String)
member.summary: Return a footer by id. The current lookup attempts to match the provided id to the first column title (case-insensitive). If no match is found the first footer is returned. Adjust lookup logic if you prefer an explicit footer id attribute.

member.name: M:MVCApplication.XMLServices.XMLConfigService.GetFaqs
member.summary: Return all parsed FAQs.

member.name: M:MVCApplication.XMLServices.XMLConfigService.GetFaq(System.String)
member.summary: Find a faq by id (case-insensitive). Returns null if not found.
